scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,blue "npm run dev -w @bestapp/backend" "npm run dev -w @bestapp/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @bestapp/shared && npm run build -w @bestapp/ui && npm run build -w @bestapp/backend && npm run build -w @bestapp/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @bestapp/backend && npm run lint -w @bestapp/frontend
